top_strategic.title: Sponsorship whitespace: 4 equipment categories with ZERO brand detection
top_strategic.evidence: The camera sees these items but we detect no brands. ZERO detections: accessories, apparel, footwear, wristband. Near-zero: sunglasses(2). Each gap = a brand that could be paying for visibility data.
top_strategic.action: Add shoe/apparel/sunglasses brand detection examples to Gemini prompt — immediate revenue unlock

top_strategic.title: Coaching AI as SaaS for Players (Not Facilities)
top_strategic.evidence: Give every player a free AI coach that analyzes their own clips (uploaded or Courtana-captured) and tells them what to fix. Upsell: $9.99/mo for personalized 'rival analysis' (compare your backhand to pros). Players share coaching insights on social → viral clips → more players onboard. Facilities become your distribution, not your customer. Collect data at scale, monetize coaching subscriptions.

top_strategic.title: Longitudinal tracking possible: 73 players with 5+ clips
top_strategic.evidence: 73 players have enough data for improvement tracking. Top: PickleBill(627), Chintan(186), Coach_Block(126), Tmf(125), Ironvarr(107)
top_strategic.action: Build player improvement trajectory product — track skill changes over time

top_strategic.title: Sponsorship whitespace detected in 3955 clips (96.9%) — sell to brands
top_strategic.evidence: We detect unbranded equipment/space in 3955 clips. This is the gap between what's visible and what's branded — sellable data.
top_strategic.action: Package sponsorship whitespace data as 'brand opportunity report' for equipment companies

top_strategic.title: Endorsement intelligence: 187 player-brand pairs with 3+ co-occurrences
top_strategic.evidence: Top pairs: PickleBill-JOOLA(1066x), Chintan-JOOLA(293x), Tmf-JOOLA(276x), Coach_Block-JOOLA(231x), Ironvarr-JOOLA(226x)
top_strategic.action: Build 'brand ambassador identification' product for equipment companies

top_data.title: Viral shot: 'overhead' clips average 5.12 viral vs 'none' at 1
top_data.evidence: Shot viral averages: overhead=5.12, speed_up=4.27, reset=3.87, volley=3.54, dink=2.94, drive=2.89, serve=2.18, unknown=1.17, none=1
top_data.action: Prioritize highlight reels featuring high-viral shot types

top_data.title: Prompt fix: 5 badges consistently missed — add positive examples
top_data.evidence: Production awards these but DaaS misses them: 'rally master' (6 missed), 'new look' (5 missed), 'steady eddie' (4 missed), 'fresh fit' (3 missed), 'paddle tap celebration' (3 missed). These are real badges that our prompt doesn't detect.
top_data.action:
Add positive examples to Gemini prompt:
'When analyzing badges, make sure to check for these commonly missed badges:
  - rally master: Look for [describe visual pattern]
  - new look: Look for [describe visual pattern]
  - steady eddie: Look for [describe visual pattern]
  - fresh fit: Look for [describe visual pattern]
  - paddle tap celebration: Look for [describe visual pattern]

top_data.title: DaaS badge prediction: F1=0.99 (precision=0.99, recall=0.98)
top_data.evidence: Across 531 verified clips: 2038 correct predictions, 16 false positives, 41 missed badges. Overall F1=0.986.
top_data.action: Target recall improvement: add more badge examples to Gemini prompt

top_data.title: Signature moves = viral gold: 4053 clips with signatures avg 3.0 viral vs 3.9
top_data.evidence: 4053 clips have identified signature moves, averaging 3.0 viral vs 3.9 for clips without.
top_data.action: Auto-tag signature move clips as premium content

top_data.title: Net/venue branding inflates 7 brands — true share-of-court differs from raw counts
top_data.evidence: Brands with significant venue-only detections (not product use): JOOLA (534/6779 are venue), Nicol (6/14 are venue), PUSHIT (5/9 are venue), Onix (4/45 are venue), adidas (4/47 are venue). Raw counts overstate market share. Product-use only: JOOLA=6245, Nike=668, PICKLEBALL=210, Reolink=130, HEAD=118.
top_data.action: Report TRUE share-of-court (product-use only) to brand partners, not raw detection counts

all_findings.title: Viral formula: quality (7.39 vs 4.53) + watchability (6.78 vs 2.57)
all_findings.evidence: Top 100 viral clips: quality=7.39, watchability=6.78. Bottom 100: quality=4.53, watchability=2.57. Both metrics track strongly with viral potential.
all_findings.action: Use (quality + watchability) / 2 as quick viral prediction score

all_findings.title: Endorsement intelligence: 187 player-brand pairs with 3+ co-occurrences
all_findings.evidence: Top pairs: PickleBill-JOOLA(1066x), Chintan-JOOLA(293x), Tmf-JOOLA(276x), Coach_Block-JOOLA(231x), Ironvarr-JOOLA(226x)
all_findings.action: Build 'brand ambassador identification' product for equipment companies

all_findings.title: Rally length matters: long rallies are more viral (long=3.1 vs short=2.2)
all_findings.evidence: Avg rally: 15.6 shots. Long rallies (15+): 2087 clips, avg viral 3.1. Short (4-): 64 clips, avg viral 2.2.
all_findings.action: Use rally length as a quality signal in highlight curation

all_findings.title: Prompt fix: JOOLA appears in 392/531 verified clips — add disambiguation
all_findings.evidence: JOOLA dominates 74% of clips. Prompt should distinguish: paddle logo (real JOOLA use), net logo (JOOLA sponsors nets), and venue branding (JOOLA sponsors the facility).
all_findings.action:
Add to brand detection prompt:
'For JOOLA specifically, classify detection source:
  - paddle: JOOLA logo on paddle face = confirmed product use
  - net: JOOLA logo on net = venue sponsorship, NOT product use
  - venue: JOOLA on walls/banners = facility sponsorship
Only count paddle detections as brand_category: paddle'

all_findings.title: Social caption generation at 99.9% — ready to productize
all_findings.evidence: Social media captions are generated for 4080/4083 clips. This is already a viable content-as-a-service product.
all_findings.action: Create API endpoint for social caption generation — charge per clip

all_findings.title: Viral arc: 'top_play' is 160.0x more likely in top clips (16.0% vs 0.0%)
all_findings.evidence: Story arc 'top_play' appears in 16.0% of top-viral clips but only 0.0% of bottom-viral clips.
all_findings.action: Prioritize 'top_play' clips in automated highlight reels

all_findings.title: Brand-skill split: PICKLEBALL KINGDOM users excel at kitchen (7.5), PSA users at power (6.29)
all_findings.evidence: Among brands with 10+ clips: PICKLEBALL KINGDOM has highest avg kitchen mastery (7.5), while PSA has highest power rating (6.29).
all_findings.action: Build brand-skill correlation report for brand partnerships

all_findings.title: Top content creators: PickleBill leads with 627 clips
all_findings.evidence:
PickleBill: 627 clips, viral=3.2, Steady Eddie
Chintan: 186 clips, viral=3.4, Dink Specialist
Coach_Block: 126 clips, viral=2.8, Steady Eddie
Tmf: 125 clips, viral=3.4, Steady Eddie
Ironvarr: 107 clips, viral=3.4, Kitchen Master
all_findings.action: Create player spotlight feature for top contributors

all_findings.title: The Idea Lab as White-Label SaaS
all_findings.evidence: Package your 7-researcher + synthesizer system as plug-and-play software. Sell to Nike's insights team ($100K/yr), JOOLA's product team ($75K/yr), PPA League ($150K/yr), and individual facility owners ($5K/yr). Each gets their own Idea Lab asking *their* questions. Data flows back to you (they share findings). Network effect: more customers = more diverse questions = better AI training for your core model.
all_findings.action: Evaluate: platform_play play

all_findings.title: Sponsorship whitespace detected in 3955 clips (96.9%) — sell to brands
all_findings.evidence: We detect unbranded equipment/space in 3955 clips. This is the gap between what's visible and what's branded — sellable data.
all_findings.action: Package sponsorship whitespace data as 'brand opportunity report' for equipment companies

all_findings.title: Brands Supply Gear, We Detect & Pay Them
all_findings.evidence: Flip the script: pitch JOOLA, Nike, etc. to give us inventory (demo rackets, shoes). Facilities use them free. We detect usage automatically and PAY brands per appearance + conversion (player buys the product later). Brands get free distribution + attribution data. You own the equipment placement, the detection, AND the attribution tracking. Defensible moat because brands trust your data over self-reported sales.
all_findings.action: Evaluate: partnership_flip play

all_findings.title: Skill standout: Ajr averages 8.5 in consistency across 6 clips
all_findings.evidence: Ajr skill profile: consistency=8.5, kitchen=8.2, touch=8.0, composure=7.5, court_iq=7.0, court_coverage=6.2, athleticism=5.2, power=3.0, creativity=3.0
all_findings.action: Feature Ajr in coaching product showcase

connections.strategic_finding: Sponsorship whitespace: 4 equipment categories with ZERO brand detection

product_concept.name: EquipmentGapFiller
product_concept.first_screen: Dashboard showing 4 equipment categories (shoes, paddles, apparel, bags) with $0 sponsorship spend overlay. Each category displays the 5 most-missed detection badges (e.g., 'ankle support', 'grip texture') with toggle to 'Add as training examples'. User clicks one badge to auto-generate 10 positive prompt examples for the model.
product_concept.why_powerful: Directly monetizes whitespace by identifying exactly which product attributes sponsors need to claim, then fixes detection blindness simultaneously.

connections.strategic_finding: Sponsorship whitespace: 4 equipment categories with ZERO brand detection
connections.data_finding: Net/venue branding inflates 7 brands — true share-of-court differs from raw counts
connections.combined_insight: Combine 'Sponsorship whitespace: 4 equipment cate' with 'Net/venue branding inflates 7 brands — t' for a targeted product.

product_concept.name: CourtShareTruthEngine
product_concept.first_screen: Side-by-side comparison view: left shows raw brand detection counts (7 brands inflated by net/venue branding), right shows 'True Share-of-Court %' after venue attribution removal. User selects a brand to see breakdown: 'Nike: 23 raw detections, 8 venue-caused = 15 true.' Export button generates corrected sponsorship valuation report.
product_concept.why_powerful: Sponsors pay for true product placement visibility—this product corrects the metric they buy against, unlocking 4 untapped equipment categories with accurate benchmarks.

product_concept.name: BrandDisambiguator
product_concept.first_screen: Alert card: 'JOOLA over-detected in 392/531 clips (73%). Likely false positives: venue branding, similar logos, low-res frames.' User sees 3-clip carousel showing misclassified examples with annotation. One-click action: 'Apply context filter' (venue ID, resolution thresholds, logo proximity rules) to recalibrate JOOLA's true presence to ~120 clips.
product_concept.why_powerful: Fixes the single largest detection error in the dataset while revealing 4 undervalued equipment categories that were obscured by JOOLA noise.
